extract: If you were looking for the Double Battling Trainer class, see Double Team (Trainer class). Double Team (Japanese: かげぶんしん Shadow Divide) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation I. It is TM32 from Generation I to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl., as well as in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
